name: Polyline Flow
summary: A Cesium route flow-light effect for command dispatch routes, migration lines, attack paths, and high-speed data tracks.
useCases: Migration, logistics, or traffic flow lines
Attack path or high-energy route animation

positions.description: WGS84 route points. Each point supports longitude, latitude, and optional height.

type.description: Flow style. dispatch is clean route light, migration is soft continuous movement, attack is sharper and more aggressive, comet has a bright head, and electric adds an energetic color personality.

color.description: CSS color used by the base line and moving trails.

trailLength.description: Trail length as a fraction of total route length.

pulseCount.description: Number of animated flow pulses layered on the route.

cornerRadius.description: Corner rounding strength for route bends. 0 keeps sharp corners; higher values insert smooth bend samples before rendering.

glowPower.description: Glow strength passed to Cesium PolylineGlowMaterialProperty.

minimal.code:
import { createPolylineFlowEffect } from '@ztgk/geo-effect-kit'

const flow = createPolylineFlowEffect(viewer, {
  positions: [
    { longitude: 116.285, latitude: 39.87 },
    { longitude: 116.394, latitude: 39.91 },
    { longitude: 116.505, latitude: 39.9 },
  ],
  type: 'dispatch',
  color: '#33f7ff',
  speed: 1.4,
  width: 7,
  trailLength: 0.34,
  pulseCount: 4,
  cornerRadius: 0.18,
})

flow.flyTo()
flow.destroy()

update.code:
flow.update({
  type: 'attack',
  color: '#ff315a',
  speed: 2.4,
  width: 10,
  trailLength: 0.42,
  pulseCount: 6,
  cornerRadius: 0.22,
})

notes: Pass an existing Cesium Viewer; the SDK does not create or own the viewer.
The base route uses Cesium PolylineGlowMaterialProperty, with moving trail polylines layered above it.
Changing positions, clampToGround, or cornerRadius rebuilds route entities; style changes update live.
Call destroy() during page cleanup to remove the data source and render loop.
